titleStmt.title: Zheng Shuzu Tianzhu shan ming e (title-portion) (rubbing)
天柱山銘 (額) / 鄭叔祖天柱山銘額（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Zheng Shuzu Tianzhu shan ming e (title-portion). GENUINE Zheng Daozhao cliff group (Tianzhu shan ming, Pingdu, Shandong). 'Shuzu' 叔祖 is Zheng Daozhao's courtesy name as used in the Berkeley catalogue. Part of 鄭道昭碑全集 series. Companion records for the same inscription/its sections: 244549, 244550, 244551, 244552, 244553, 244554, 244555 (different rubbing sets/portions). UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Dated 565 in record (post-dates Zheng Daozhao's death 516); traditionally the Tianzhu shan 天柱山 group is assigned to Zheng Daozhao's Yunfeng/Tianzhu cliff project of c.511-516 — the catalogue date should be treated cautiously.

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
